AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Economics, University of Dhaka, Dhaka, Bangladesh.
Department of Health Sciences, University of York, Heslington, United Kingdom.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The authors have completed and submitted the ICMJE Form for Disclosure of Potential Conflicts of Interest and none was reported.

Reference.Citation: GBD 2019 Tobacco Collaborators Spatial, temporal, and demographic patterns in prevalence of smoking tobacco use and attributable disease burden in 204 countries and territories, 1990–2019: a systematic analysis from the Global Burden of Disease Study 2019.
